transcript.text: in @src/session.ts change price to price_usd and store it as float. after that update version to 2

transcript.name: edit

transcript.text:
Done. Changes `src/session.ts`:

- `SessionJson.price: string` → `price_usd: number`, `version: 1` → `version: 2`
- `fetchPrice` returns `number` (raw USD float, rounded to 4 decimals). Fetch fail / not found / free → `0`
- `build()` returns `version: 2`, uses `price_usd`

Note: error/no-model cases now collapse to `0`, losing the old `"N/A"`/`"FREE"` distinction. Want sentinel (e.g. `null` or `-1`) for unfetchable instead?
